name: Apple Card
perks: 3% Daily Cash back at Apple and select merchants (Nike, Uber, Walgreens, etc.)
2% Daily Cash on all Apple Pay purchases
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, no late fees, no over-limit fees
Daily Cash paid to Apple Cash card every day
Titanium physical card with no visible card number for security
Built-in spending summaries and financial health tools in iPhone Wallet
0% APR financing on Apple products via Apple Card Monthly Installments
drawbacks: Only 1% back when using the physical card
Requires an iPhone to manage the account
Limited to Goldman Sachs partnership, future uncertain
Not accepted everywhere Apple Pay isn't supported
